title: Pipe Cleaners for Craft – 100 Coloured Chenille Stems, 15cm x 4mm – Fuzzy Craft Pipe Cleaners for Kids’ Arts, School Projects & DIY Decorations
features: 100 Coloured Pipe Cleaners – Value pack of 100 chenille stems, each 15cm x 4mm, perfect for school crafts, classroom supplies and creative kids’ activities.
Flexible & Fuzzy Craft Wires – Soft, bendable pipe cleaners that twist easily into shapes for decorations, models, animals, flowers, jewellery and DIY projects.
Kids’ Arts & School Projects – Safe, colourful craft pipe cleaners designed for children’s art lessons, group projects, playtime fun and after-school clubs.
Versatile Crafting Material – Ideal for making Christmas decorations, Easter crafts, costumes, party accessories, card embellishments and handmade gifts
Essential Craft Supplies – Lightweight, reusable stems for teachers, hobbyists and families; a staple addition to any home craft box or creative toolkit.
description: Product Description Kids B Crafty pipe cleaners are very fluffy and excellent quality ( photo shows the quality, we sell different lengths and colours) Colourful pipe cleaners Introducing our versatile and high-quality Pipe Cleaners for Craft, the perfect tool for all your crafting needs. These coloured Pipe Cleaners are specifically designed to provide excellent flexibility and durability, making them ideal for creating intricate designs and adding unique textures to your projects. Whether you're a professional artist or a DIY enthusiast, our Pipe Cleaners are a must-have for any crafting arsenal. Get creative and let your imagination run wild with these Pipe Cleaners.
